description: Gain +5 Affinity Points per <turn></turn> <hyperlink>Turn</hyperlink> in every branch where you have at least 3 <hyperlink>Affinity</hyperlink>.

(<hyperlink>Heroes</hyperlink> count as Tier 5).</bullet><bullet>Friendly Units inside your Cities gain +5 <hyperlink><xp></xp> Experience</hyperlink> Per <turn></turn> <hyperlink>Turn</hyperlink>.</bullet></bulletlist>

30 Grievances against all other Empires. These cannot be traded or lost.

Your Units all immediately gain enough Experience to level up.
